name: briefing_locator_panel_constructor
description: HudUiBriefingLocatorPanel::Constructor builds the hidden red locator circle for briefing objective markers.
known_limits: No VC byte target currently covers 0x403c10, so Binary-safe remains false.
The compiler-generated EH registration is tracked as provider boundary at 0x4c82e8 rather than authored source.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x403c10 validate zVid::PackColorRGB(0xff, 0, 0), HudUiCircle::Constructor(self, 100, 110, 30, color), g_HudUiBriefingLocatorPanel_FTable installation, HudUiElement::SetVisible(0), and return of self.

The native smoke constructs a briefing runtime and verifies all six embedded locator panels have the briefing locator ftable, x=100, y=110, hidden flag set, radius=30, radiusSquared=900, and the packed locator color.
